s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ANTENNA CORD SUB-ASSEMBLY

atten4.ptxt: The double-sided tape and tape are not available as supply parts. If these tapes still have enough adhesion to secure the roof headlining and antenna cord, reuse the tapes. If the roof headlining has been replaced with a new one, or if the tape and/or the double-sided tape is no longer sticky, apply new tape following the procedures below.

s2.ptxt: Apply new double-sided tape.

s3.ptxt: Remove the double-sided tape from the roof headlining assembly.
Peel off the appropriate amount of new double-sided tape. Be careful not to touch the adhesive surface.
Apply the double-sided tape to the roof headlining while aligning the tape with the markings on the roof headlining assembly.
Peel off the backing sheet from the double-sided tape.

s2.ptxt: Install the antenna cord to the roof headlining assembly from the front of the vehicle.

atten4.ptxt: Align the taped part of the antenna cable with the protrusion of the roof headlining, and apply tape to secure the cable to the headlining.

s2.ptxt: Put the strips of the tape back to the positions shown in the illustration in order to secure the antenna cord to the roof headlining assembly.

item.ptxt: If the tape is no longer sticky, use other tape, such as packing tape, that has enough adhesion to secure the antenna cord to the roof headlining assembly.

For the right front corner of the roof headlining assembly, align the marking tape on the antenna cord with the protrusion of the roof headlining, and wrap tape around the antenna cord and roof headlining assembly once or twice to securely hold them.

For the right rear corner of the roof headlining assembly, align the marking tape on the antenna cord with the rear edge of the roof headlining, and secure the antenna cord to the roof headlining assembly with tape.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Pull the roof headlining assembly into the vehicle through the rear left door.
Engage the 4 clips.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage the clamp to the rear pillar RH.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar RH.
Install the radio setting condenser to the front pillar RH with the bolt.
Connect the No. 1 roof wire connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Pull the roof headlining assembly into the vehicle through the rear left door.
Engage the hook, 4 clips, and 2 fasteners.
Connect the sliding roof drive gear connector.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage the clamp to the rear pillar RH.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar RH.
Install the radio setting condenser to the front pillar RH with the bolt.
Connect the No. 1 roof wire connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SUNSHADE TRIM HOLDER (w/ Rear Sunshade)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws.
Using a screwdriver, turn the pin of each sunshade trim holder 90° to install the sunshade trim holders.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SUN ROOF OPENING TRIM MOULDING (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Align the joining point of the moulding with the notch of the roof headlining assembly, and install the sun roof opening trim moulding.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SPOT LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Push the light bulb holder in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration to engage the claw.
Engage the 4 claws.
Engage the 6 claws and install the spot light assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 ROOM LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the room light switch base to the No. 1 room light assembly.
Engage the 4 claws.
Engage the 4 claws and install the lens cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT ASSIST GRIP SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Assemble the front assist grip sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.
Install the front assist grip sub-assembly.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR ASSIST GRIP SUB-ASSEMBLY

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the rear side and the front side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL VISOR HOLDER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws.
Push in the visor holder as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL VISOR ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the visor assembly LH.
Engage the 4 claws and install the visor bracket cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL VISOR ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connectors.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and then install the roof console box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the protective cover.
Install a new clip <A> on the front pillar garnish LH.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the front pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT PILLAR GARNISH RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the protective cover.
Install a new clip <A> on the front pillar garnish RH.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the front pillar garnish RH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 clips and 2 claws, then install the roof side inner garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip.
Install the upper center pillar garnish LH with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the lower center pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Install the floor end of the front seat outer belt assembly with the bolt LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LAP BELT OUTER ANCHOR COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and install the lap belt outer anchor cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH

s2.ptxt: Install the front door opening trim weatherstrip LH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips.
Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LAP BELT OUTER ANCHOR COVER

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH

s2.ptxt: Install the front door opening trim weatherstrip RH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws to install the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw to install the No. 1 door scuff plate clamp.
Connect each connector.
Engage the rear door trim board with the 4 clips of the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.
Engage the 7 clips to install the rear door trim board to the rear door panel.
Install the 3 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DOOR ASSIST GRIP COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 claws and install the door assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws to install the rear door inside handle bezel plug.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat reclining control cable.
Engage the 2 clips and claw and then install the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.
Install the bolt.
Adjust the control lever to set the rear reclining adjuster assembly to its upper most position.
Pull plate A toward the front of the vehicle to lock the plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door opening trim weatherstrip LH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door opening trim weatherstrip RH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CENTER SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the center seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly LH with the 2bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the 2 rear seat belts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly RH with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the rear seat belt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear side seat back assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)
INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat back in the cabin.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the vehicle body.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat back assembly with the 4 bolts.
Pass the 3 seat belts through and close the cap of the 2 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Install the floor anchor part with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat in the cabin.
Connect the connectors under the seat.
Connect the cable to the negative (-) battery terminal.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the front side of the front seat assembly with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the rear side of the front seat assembly with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the front side of the front seat assembly in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the rear side of the front seat assembly in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the inner seat track bracket cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the inner seat track bracket cover to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT TRACK COVER LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the seat track cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the seat track cover to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)
INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Place the front seat assembly in the vehicle and align the adjuster pin with the hole on the vehicle side.
Connect the connector and clamp.
Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the front seat track bracket with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the rear seat track bracket with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the front seat track bracket in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the rear seat track bracket in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the inner seat track bracket cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the seat track bracket cover inner to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT TRACK COVER LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the seat track cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the seat track cover to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)
INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)
INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)
INSTALL NO. 2 ANTENNA CORD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 clamps and clip and install the No. 2 antenna cord sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 2 heater to register duct with the 2 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 2 heater to register duct with the 2 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 3 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 3 heater to register duct with the 3 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 3 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 3 heater to register duct with the 3 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 1 heater to register duct with the 3 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 1 heater to register duct with the 3 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DEFROSTER NOZZLE ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the defroster nozzle assembly with the 3 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DEFROSTER NOZZLE ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the defroster nozzle assembly with the 3 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SIDE NO. 2 DEFROSTER NOZZLE DUCT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the side No. 2 defroster nozzle duct with the screw <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SIDE NO. 2 DEFROSTER NOZZLE DUCT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the side No. 2 defroster nozzle duct with the screw <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SIDE NO. 1 DEFROSTER NOZZLE DUCT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the side No. 1 defroster nozzle duct with the screw <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SIDE NO. 1 DEFROSTER NOZZLE DUCT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the side No. 1 defroster nozzle duct with the screw <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL SAFETY PAD ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the wire harness to get caught in the claws.

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 bolts <C> or <H> and 2 nuts <I> or <Z>.
Engage each clamp.
Install the bolt <J>.
Install the 2 passenger airbag bolts <K>.
Connect each connector and install the instrument panel safety pad assembly.
with Plasmacluster:

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL SAFETY PAD ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the wire harness to get caught in the claws.

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 bolts <N>, <a> or <b> and 2 nuts <U>.
Engage each clamp.
Install the bolt <Y>.
Install the 2 passenger airbag bolts <V>.
Connect each connector and install the instrument panel safety pad assembly.
with Plasmacluster:

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 DEFROSTER NOZZLE GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the 4 guides.
Engage the 8 clips and install the No. 1 defroster nozzle garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT NO. 2 SPEAKER ASSEMBLY (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Install the front No. 2 speaker assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 1 SPEAKER PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 guides.
Engage the 6 claws and the 2 clips to install the instrument panel No. 1 speaker panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 1 REGISTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 clips and install the instrument panel No. 1 register assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the protective cover.
Install a new clip <A> on the front pillar garnish LH.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the front pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT NO. 2 SPEAKER ASSEMBLY (for RH Side)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 SPEAKER PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 guides.
Engage the 6 claws and the 2 clips to install the instrument panel No. 2 speaker panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 3 REGISTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 clips and install the instrument panel No. 3 register assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT PILLAR GARNISH RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the protective cover.
Install a new clip <A> on the front pillar garnish RH.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the front pillar garnish RH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip.
Install the No. 1 console box insert front with the 3 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip.
Install the No. 1 console box insert front with the 3 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip.
Install the No. 2 console box insert front with the 3 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip.
Install the No. 2 console box insert front with the 3 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 screws <F>.
Install the console box assembly with the 2 bolts <G>.
Engage the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 screws <O>.
Install the console box assembly with the 2 bolts <S> or <T>.
Engage the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX CARPET

s2.ptxt: Install the console box carpet.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX POCKET

s2.ptxt: Install the console box pocket.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RADIO RECEIVER WITH HEATER CONTROL PANEL ASSEMBLY (w/o Navigation System)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the 4 clips.
Install the radio receiver with heater control panel assembly with the 4 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NAVIGATION RECEIVER WITH HEATER CONTROL PANEL ASSEMBLY (w/ Navigation System)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the 4 clips.
Install the navigation receiver with heater control panel assembly with the 4 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 REGISTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 7 clips and install the instrument panel No. 2 register assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the 4 claws.
Install the upper console panel sub-assembly with the 2 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the 4 claws.
Install the upper console panel sub-assembly with the 2 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 5 clips to install the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and 5 clips to install the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FLOOR SHIFT POSITION INDICATOR HOUSING SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: with Seat Heater System:
Engage the 6 claws and the 3 clips to install the floor shift position indicator housing sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE PANEL (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and the 5 clips to install the upper console panel as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the No. 2 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the No. 1 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Install the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Install the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 3 clips.
Install the 4 screws <B>.
Install the lower instrument panel sub-assembly with the bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and 3 clips.

Install the screw or

and 3 screws .
Install the lower instrument panel sub-assembly with the bolt <N>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 UNDER COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and 2 guides and install the instrument panel No. 2 under cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Install the combination meter assembly with the 4 screws <E>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Install the combination meter assembly with the 4 screws <R>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL

s2.ptxt: Engage the guide and the 4 claws.
Install the instrument cluster finish panel with the 2 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 2 clips to install the No. 1 instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL TURN SIGNAL SWITCH ASSEMBLY WITH SPIRAL CABLE SUB-ASSEMBLY
ADJUST SPIRAL CABLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Rotate the spiral cable counterclockwise slowly by hand until it feels firm.

atten3.ptxt: Do not turn the spiral cable by the airbag wire harness.

s2.ptxt: Rotate the spiral cable clockwise approximately 2.5 turns to align the marks.

atten3.ptxt: Do not turn the spiral cable by the airbag wire harness.

atten4.ptxt: The spiral cable will rotate approximately 2.5 turns to both the left and right from the center.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STEERING COLUMN COVER (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the upper steering column cover.
Engage the 2 claws and install the lower steering column cover.
Install the steering column cover with the 2 screws <D>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STEERING COLUMN COVER (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the upper steering column cover.
Engage the 2 claws and install the lower steering column cover.
Install the steering column cover with the 2 screws <Q>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.
Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw <B> and bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.

Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw or

and bolt .

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips.
Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STEERING WHEEL ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Align the matchmarks on the steering wheel assembly and steering main shaft.
Install the steering wheel assembly set nut.
Connect the connectors to the spiral cable sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STEERING PAD

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) terminal is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Support the steering pad with one hand as shown in the illustration.
Connect the 2 airbag connectors to the steering pad.

atten3.ptxt: When handling the airbag connector, take care not to damage the airbag wire harness.

s2.ptxt: Connect the horn connector to the steering pad.
Confirm that the circumference groove of the "torx" screw fits in the screw case, and place the steering pad onto the steering wheel assembly.
Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), tighten the 2 "torx" screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER NO. 3 STEERING WHEEL COVER

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 3 lower steering wheel cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER NO. 2 STEERING WHEEL COVER

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 2 lower steering wheel cover.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL (for Manual Seat)
INSPECT SLIDE ADJUSTER LOCK (for Manual Seat)
INSPECT FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)
PERFORM ZERO POINT CALIBRATION AND SENSITIVITY CHECK (for Front Passenger Seat)
INSPECT STEERING PAD

s2.ptxt: With the steering pad installed on the vehicle, perform a visual check. If there are any defects as mentioned below, replace the steering pad with a new one:

item.ptxt: Cuts, minute cracks or marked discoloration on the steering pad top surface or in the grooved portion.

s2.ptxt: Make sure that the horn sounds.

atten4.ptxt: If the horn does not sound, inspect the horn system (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT SRS WARNING LIGHT
